premise: The cofounder relationship that started cracking at baggage claim is about to open up wider; the city has receipts and is ready to file them.

scenes.beat: A TechCrunch reporter corners the founder at a Mission cafe, claiming three sources confirm the cofounder is on her way out.
scenes.hingesOn: the cofounder being mid-tantrum from the baggage-claim arc

scenes.beat: A Thiel-coded VC offers a pre-empt term sheet at Rosewood Sand Hill, conditional on the cofounder moving to advisory.
scenes.hingesOn: what the founder told the reporter

scenes.beat: A competing-startup CEO drops a thread about the founder's pivot; the timeline doubles down within an hour.
scenes.hingesOn: whether the founder accepted the term sheet

scenes.beat: The cofounder confronts the founder over the term sheet language she found in her email this morning.
A YC partner with the blog gives the founder one last piece of advice in a Palo Alto office before Demo Day.
scenes.hingesOn: the cumulative trajectory across the 4 prior scenes
